MASTER CALENDAR COURT

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT WOLTERS KLUWER ELM SOLUTIONS, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is adopted, as follows:

The verified application of Mary Margaret Moore to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendant Wolters Kluwer Elm Solutions, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2019 Set For Trial On Feb-24-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Off Calendar
